known_issues: Customer adding feature is broken and not working despite previous fix attempt

existing_features.title: Fix the AddCustomerModal so that submitting a new customer (name, phone, previous credit) successfully calls the backend addCustomer mutation and reflects the new customer in the customer list on the Home Page. The fix must handle both online and offline (queue) paths, ensure the actor is ready before submission, clear form state on success, and close the modal without errors.

projectName: Fix broken Add Customer functionality on Home Page
